name: Brave and Glory
short_description: This thrilling real-time strategy tower defense game immerses you in a three-dimensional world, where every decision matters and every action impacts the outcome of the battle. Get ready for epic battles and become the hero of the kingdom!
detailed_description:
You embody a brave knight, whose mission is to defend the kingdom from the invasion of orcs.
You will need to strategically place towers and walls to prevent the enemy orcs from invading and reaching the royal treasury.
This thrilling real-time strategy tower defense game immerses you in a three-dimensional world, where every decision matters and every action impacts the outcome of the battle.
Get ready for epic battles and become the hero of the kingdom!

Game features:
Variety of towers: players can choose from different types of towers, each with unique abilities.
Dynamic gameplay.
Three-dimensional graphics: a picturesque medieval world.
Variety of enemies.
